strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, Java, Kotlin, Python)
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and AI tools (MCP, code generators)
Proven track record in optimizing large-scale systems (e.g., pricing automation for millions of mails, low-latency microservices)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework for the role
No mention of Vitest or React testing frameworks, despite required proficiency
Scattered focus due to diverse stack (D, C++, etc.), raising questions about depth in core secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java)
response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack experience (10+ years) with primary technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and demonstrates expertise in AI agent infrastructure, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, there is no explicit evidence of Nest.js usage (the primary backend framework) or Vitest/React testing, both of which are core requirements. The diversity of languages (D, C++, Swift) may dilute focus on the required secondary stack (Kotlin/Java).
